tool_calls: ls -l /data && echo '--- orders ---' && head -n 5 /data/orders.csv && echo '--- products ---' && head -n 5 /data/products.csv
awk -F, 'NR==FNR{if(FNR>1){cat[$1]=$3;price[$1]=$4}next} FNR>1{rev[cat[$2]]+=$3*price[$2]} END{for(c in rev) printf "%s: %s\n", c, rev[c]}' /data/products.csv /data/orders.csv | sort -t: -k2,2nr

tool_outputs.commands: ls -l /data && echo '--- orders ---' && head -n 5 /data/orders.csv && echo '--- products ---' && head -n 5 /data/products.csv
tool_outputs.stdout:
-rw-r--r--       77 2026-07-12 00:34 orders.csv
-rw-r--r--      101 2026-07-12 00:34 products.csv
--- orders ---
order_id,product_id,quantity
1,101,3
2,102,5
3,101,2
4,103,1
--- products ---
product_id,name,category,price
101,Widget,hardware,25
102,Gadget,electronics,50
103,Bolt,hardware,10

tool_outputs.commands: awk -F, 'NR==FNR{if(FNR>1){cat[$1]=$3;price[$1]=$4}next} FNR>1{rev[cat[$2]]+=$3*price[$2]} END{for(c in rev) printf "%s: %s\n", c, rev[c]}' /data/products.csv /data/orders.csv | sort -t: -k2,2nr
